title: Using Subitems for RAID Log
excerpt: Does anyone use Subitems to track RAID items on a project? (RAID = Risk, Assumption, Issue, Decision)  I see there is a RAID Log template available, however, we’d like to connect RAID items to specific tasks/items on the…

posts.author: alexisk (Alexis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Does anyone use Subitems to track RAID items on a project? (RAID = Risk, Assumption, Issue, Decision) I see there is a RAID Log template available, however, we’d like to connect RAID items to specific tasks/items on the project plan. My thinking is that the best way to do this will be to utilize the Subitem feature and then roll-up all Subitems into a separate board to show all RAID items across projects. How have others solved for associating RAID items to project tasks/items?

Thank you in advance!
